name: @onmyagent/handsfree
description: macOS semantic AX and background computer-use runtime for OnMyAgent

scripts.check: pnpm run check:js && pnpm run check:native
scripts.check:js: node --check bin/onmyagent-handsfree-computer-use.mjs && node --check src/cua-runner.mjs && node --check src/realtime-tools.mjs
